site.description: A modular, measurable audit architecture for hotels: mystery guest visits that establish what your guests actually experience, and staff training that closes the gaps they find.

home.metaDescription: Our senior auditors arrive at your property as guests. They measure the gap between your brand standard and what happens on the floor, and report the revenue leaking through it in figures.

hero.title: Your guest sees everything. So do we.
hero.body: Our auditors have run hotels at senior level. They arrive at your property as guests, measure the gap between the brand standard you promise and what actually happens on the floor, and put the revenue leaking through that gap in front of you in figures.

mysteryShopping.title: Hotel Audits by Mystery Guest
mysteryShopping.description: From reservation to check-out, we measure the whole guest experience — unannounced, and with no stake in the answer.

staffTraining.title: Staff Training
staffTraining.description: We turn what the audit finds into department-level training programmes, with outcomes you can measure.

discovery.title: DISCOVERY
discovery.description: Needs call, NDA signed, modules selected.

field.title: FIELD
field.description: An unannounced mystery guest visit; evidence gathered against standard checklists.

report.title: REPORT
report.description: SWOT and ROI analysis; revenue leakage and gaps in plain figures.

transformation.title: TRANSFORMATION
transformation.description: Department-level staff training, and a follow-up audit.

modules.description: an audit architecture you assemble to fit

turnaround.description: to preliminary findings after the site visit

compliance.description: KVKK-compliant data collection and evidence analysis

auditTerminal.srLabel: Sample mystery guest audit log: check-in and bellboy met the standard; room hygiene, recipe portioning and upselling each showed a deviation.

finalCta.title: Let us take an honest picture of your property.

A.title: Front Office
A.summary: An audit of first contact, greeting speed, data-entry accuracy and the financial controls sitting behind them.
scope: KVKK consent and CRM data accuracy
Crisis handling and the check-out process

B.title: Food & Beverage (F&B)
B.summary: Culinary quality assurance, recipe fidelity, speed, hygiene (HACCP) and shrinkage control.
scope: Restaurant and à la carte service flow and speed
Bar recipe fidelity and portion control

C.title: Wellness & Recreation
C.summary: Luxury service standards, microbiological hygiene, non-negotiable safety and revenue levers across spa, pool, beach and fitness.
scope: Pool chemistry, beach and lifesaving cover

E.title: Housekeeping & In-Room
E.summary: Sensory first impression, textiles, deep microbiological hygiene, and how the equipment nobody thinks to check actually performs.
scope: Sensory first impression and climate control

D.title: 360° Full Audit
D.summary: Cross-department synergy, internal communication, training needs analysis, and a SWOT roadmap written for the board.
scope: All of modules A + B + C + E
Crisis simulation, TNA and board-level SWOT

EGITIM.title: Staff Training
EGITIM.summary: On-site training programmes, department by department, fed by what the audit found and measured against it.
scope: Front office, F&B and housekeeping programmes

modules.scaleNote: Listed prices are for standard-scale properties. Request a quote for a property of a different scale.

cart.removeAria: Remove the {title} module from your quote

packageOffer.body: All {count} modules you have selected sit inside this package. <old>{separate}</old> becomes <new>{packageTotal}</new> — <save>you save {saving}.</save>

modulesPage.title: Build your audit module by module.
modulesPage.body: Pick the modules you need and point the spend straight at your priorities. {total} criteria in total, each tied to a form of evidence.
modulesPage.metaDescription: Front office, F&B, wellness, housekeeping and the 360° full audit. Choose the modules you need and build your quote.

modulePage.metaDescription: {summary} {count} criteria, each tied to a form of evidence.
